name: Elective Payment of Applicable Credits (Direct Pay)

eligibility.description: Available to tax-exempt organizations, state/local governments, Indian tribal governments, and cooperatives. Also available to taxable businesses for clean hydrogen (45V), carbon sequestration (45Q), and advanced manufacturing (45X) credits.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows tax-exempt entities and certain businesses to receive a direct cash payment from the IRS in lieu of a nonrefundable tax credit for clean energy investments.
